name: python3-setuptools
title: python3-setuptools
description:
Python3 Distutils Enhancements
Extensions to the python-distutils for large or complex distributions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-setuptools because Python3 Distutils Enhancements.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-setuptools as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-setuptools with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-setuptools --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
